title: Contact Single Window partner programs - Canada.ca
content:
## Contact Single Window partner programs
For system questions please contact the appropriate technical support team.  If your questions are program/regulation specific please contact the appropriate program/partner.

## Single Window help desk
For help with navigating through the Single Window system and using the Single Window Information Manager
Email: gigu-swim@ec.gc.ca
For technical help with GCKey
Tel.: 1-855-438-1102

## Interac sign-in service
For help with logging in with sign-in service
Tel.: 1-855-433-5397

### CEPA Pollution Prevention Planning (P2)
P2 program information Regulatory Innovation and Management Systems Division 351 St. Joseph Blvd. Gatineau, Quebec K1A 0H3
Email: planp2-p2plan@ec.gc.ca

### Chemicals Management Plan (CMP)
CMP program information Substances Management Information Line 351 St. Joseph Blvd. Gatineau, Quebec K1A 0H3
Tel.: 1-800-567-1999 / 819-938-3232 Email: Substances@ec.gc.ca

### Effluent Regulatory Reporting Information System (ERRIS)
ERRIS program information Industrial Sectors and Chemicals Directorate
351 St. Joseph Blvd., 19th Floor Gatineau, Quebec K1A 0H3
Fax: (819) 420-7380 Tel.: (819) 420-7727 Email: eu-ww@ec.gc.ca

### Environmental Effects Monitoring Electronic Reporting (EEMER)
EEMER program information Forest Products and Fisheries Act Division 351 St. Joseph Blvd., 19th Floor Gatineau, Quebec K1A 0H3
Email: ESEE-EEM@ec.gc.ca

### Environmental Emergency program (E2)
E2 Program Information Environmental Emergencies Division 351 St. Joseph Blvd., 10th Floor Gatineau, Quebec K1A 0H3
Email: ue_gigu-e2_swim@ec.gc.ca

### ePCB reporting program
ePCB Program Information Waste Reduction and Management Division 351 St. Joseph Blvd. Gatineau, Quebec, K1A 0H3
Tel.: 1-844-815-6418 Email: bpc-pcb@ec.gc.ca

### Regulatory Operations Program, Cross-border Movement of Hazardous Waste and Hazardous Recyclable Material Regulations (XBR)
XBR Program Information Waste Reduction and Management Division 351 St. Joseph Blvd., 9th floor Gatineau, Quebec  K1A 0H3
Tel.: 1-800-668-6767 Notification team email: notification@ec.gc.ca Movement team email: dm-md@ec.gc.ca CNMTS team email: cnmts-scnsm@ec.gc.ca

### Grants and Contributions Enterprise Management System (GCEMS)
GCEMS program information Corporate Services and Finance Branch 351 St. Jospeh Blvd. Gatineau, Quebec K1A 0H3
Email: sgesc-gcems@ec.gc.ca

### Greenhouse Gas Reporting Program (GHGRP)
GHGRP program information 351 St. Joseph Blvd. Gatineau, Quebec K1A 0H3
Tel.: 1-877-877-8375 / 819-938-3258 Email: GES-GHG@ec.gc.ca

MERS program information
Email: sdem-mers@ec.gc.ca

MSAPR program information
Electricity and Combustion Division 351 St. Joseph Blvd., 11th floor Gatineau, Quebec K1A 0H3
